name: Kira Steelblade
backstory: I was born in the mountain village of Frostpeak, where every child learns to fight before they can read. My father was the village champion, and he trained me from age 5. At 14, I defended our village when frost giants attacked - I killed my first giant that day with my father's greatsword. I left home at 16 to join the Iron Legion, the kingdom's elite fighting force. I rose through the ranks, earning my steel through blood and sweat. I fought in the War of the Crimson Plains, holding the line when our battalion was surrounded by enemy forces. I earned the name 'Steelblade' when I shattered an enemy commander's enchanted blade with a single strike. I've dueled in 47 arena matches, winning 45. I lost an eye to a poison dart in the Shadowfen campaign, but it made me faster, sharper. I became Captain of the King's Guard at 26 - youngest in history. I've trained 200 soldiers and led them through 12 major battles. My sword, Winterfang, was forged from a fallen star and has never failed me. I don't fight for glory anymore - I fight to protect those who can't protect themselves. I have scars on both arms, my back, and my left shoulder from battles I've survived. I respect honor and despise cowardice. I drink ale, sharpen my blade daily, and pray to the war god Valkren before every battle.

additional_context.injuries: Lost left eye to poison dart in Shadowfen, multiple scars
additional_context.defining_battle: War of the Crimson Plains - held line while surrounded
additional_context.motivation: Protect those who cannot protect themselves
